title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Boris Cherny uses Claude Code skills to automate work, detailing three strategies: agents for autonomous execution, hooks for triggering actions, and loops with scheduling for repeated tasks. The video covers a decision framework for skill creation and highlights underused features within Claude Code.
